items.title: Apple might use Google servers to store data for its upgraded AI Siri
items.description:
Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple might lean even more on Google so it can catch up in AI.
The original partnership announcement said that "the next generation of Apple Foundation Models will be based on Google's Gemini models and cloud technology," and that the models would "help power future Apple Intelligence features," incl …
Read the full story at The Verge.
items.content:
Apple has asked Google to look into "setting up servers" for a new version of Siri that's Gemini-powered and meets Apple's privacy requirements, The Information reports. Apple had already announced in January that Google's Gemini AI models would help power the upgraded version of Siri it delayed last year, but The Information's report indicates Apple might lean even more on Google so it can catch up in AI.

The original partnership announcement said that "the next generation of Apple Foundation Models will be based on Google's Gemini models and cloud technology," and that the models would "help power future Apple Intelligence features," incl …

Read the full story at The Verge.
items.author: Jay Peters
items.titleZh: 苹果或将使用谷歌服务器存储升级版人工智能Siri数据
items.descriptionZh:
根据科技媒体The Information报道，苹果已要求谷歌协助搭建符合苹果隐私要求的服务器，用于支持基于谷歌Gemini人工智能模型的新版Siri。这一动态表明，在今年1月宣布合作的基础上，苹果可能进一步依赖谷歌的技术以加速其在AI领域的追赶步伐。

今年年初，苹果曾公开表示将采用谷歌的Gemini模型和云端技术构建“下一代苹果基础模型”，这些模型将用于驱动未来的“Apple Intelligence”功能体系。此次服务器部署请求，则揭示了双方合作已进入具体实施阶段。报道指出，苹果希望确保Gemini在云端处理用户请求时，能严格遵循其设备端处理优先、隐私保护为核心的设计原则。

从技术架构看，新版Siri预计将采用混合AI处理模式：简单任务由设备端神经网络引擎处理，复杂查询则通过加密传输至Gemini云端模型。这种设计既保留了苹果本地化计算的隐私优势，又借助谷歌的大模型能力实现了复杂语义理解、多轮对话和内容生成等先进功能。值得注意的是，苹果此前推迟发布的Siri升级版本正是基于这一技术路线。

性能表现方面，Gemini模型家族（包括Nano、Pro、Ultra等版本）在多项基准测试中展现出了强大的多模态理解和推理能力。与苹果自主研发的模型相比，Gemini在参数规模、知识时效性和多语言支持上具有明显优势。不过，具体到Siri集成方案，性能表现还将取决于苹果如何在设备端模型优化、隐私保护机制与云端模型效能之间取得平衡。

此次深度合作对AI产业格局产生多重影响：首先，这标志着苹果暂时放弃了完全自主开发大语言模型的路线，转而通过生态合作快速弥补AI能力短板；其次，谷歌通过将其AI技术嵌入全球超20亿台活跃苹果设备，获得了前所未有的生态渗透力；最后，这也可能改变移动AI助手市场的竞争态势，使Siri在能力上更直接地与微软Copilot、亚马逊Alexa等对手展开竞争。

应用场景上，Gemini驱动的Siri将显著增强在邮件智能总结、跨应用复杂操作、图像内容理解、代码编写辅助等生产力场景的表现。同时，苹果严格的隐私框架要求所有云端数据处理必须经过用户明确授权且实施数据匿名化，这为行业树立了隐私保护与AI能力融合的新范式。

总体而言，这场科技巨头间的合作既反映了苹果在AI军备竞赛中的务实选择，也预示着移动智能交互将进入一个更强大却更注重隐私保护的新阶段。双方如何协调技术架构、商业模式与隐私标准，将成为影响全球AI产品进化方向的关键案例。

items.title: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
items.description:
Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future AI data centers, after Nvidia already capitalized on its 2020 acquisition of the network hardware company Mellanox to beef up NVLink and increase the amount of data moving between its GPUs. 
For Lumentum, the nonexclusive multiyear deal includes a "multibillion purchase commitment …
Read the full story at The Verge.
items.content:
Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future AI data centers, after Nvidia already capitalized on its 2020 acquisition of the network hardware company Mellanox to beef up NVLink and increase the amount of data moving between its GPUs.

For Lumentum, the nonexclusive multiyear deal includes a "multibillion purchase commitment …

Read the full story at The Verge.
items.author: Stevie Bonifield
items.titleZh: 英伟达耗资40亿美元投入光子学，以保持AI领域领先优势
items.descriptionZh:
英伟达本周一宣布，将向Lumentum和Coherent两家公司分别投资20亿美元。这两家企业均致力于开发用于数据中心的光子技术，包括光学收发器、电路开关和激光器等关键部件，旨在实现长距离高速数据传输。

此次投资建立在英伟达此前战略布局的基础上。2020年，英伟达收购网络硬件公司迈络思（Mellanox），成功强化了其NVLink技术，显著提升了GPU间的数据交换能力。如今，随着AI模型规模不断扩大，数据中心内部及之间的数据传输需求呈现爆炸式增长，传统电互连在能耗、带宽和距离上面临根本性瓶颈。光子技术利用光信号而非电信号进行数据传输，被视为下一代高性能计算和数据中心互连的关键突破方向。

Lumentum与Coherent的核心技术聚焦于光电转换与光传输。光学收发器将电信号转换为光信号，通过光纤进行极低损耗的传输，再在接收端转换回电信号。其创新点在于通过先进的集成光子学、硅光技术和高效激光器，不断提升模块的带宽密度（即单位面积或能耗下的数据传输能力）和能效比。例如，相干光通信技术能够利用光的相位和振幅信息，在单一波长上承载更多数据，从而大幅提升光纤的频谱效率。

从性能参数看，当前先进的数据中心光模块正从400G向800G乃至1.6T演进。与传统的铜缆或电互连相比，光互连在相同带宽下功耗可降低多达50%，传输距离可从数米（高速电信号）扩展至数公里甚至更远而不失真。这对于构建跨机架、跨数据中心乃至跨地域的GPU集群至关重要。英伟达的此次投资，特别是与Lumentum签订的“多年期数十亿美元采购承诺”非独家协议，旨在确保其未来AI数据中心平台能够获得稳定、先进的光子学元件供应，从而在系统层面突破数据传输瓶颈。

这项投资的技术影响深远。首先，它将加速光子技术与主流计算架构的融合，推动“光进铜退”在数据中心内部的进程。其次，它将助力英伟达构建端到端的AI计算基础设施，从GPU计算核心到网络互连，实现全栈优化。最终，高性能、低延迟、高能效的光互连将直接赋能大规模AI训练集群、高性能计算、云基础设施以及未来的沉浸式互联网应用，为下一波AI创新提供必要的基础设施支撑。

items.title: Exploring the future of Artificial Intelligence — today's models, tomorrow's agents, and the big privacy problem
items.description: The world of AI is getting more complex, and we assess the current state of LLMs, what makes them tick, and explore the risks and features that companies are looking to integrate in the future.
items.content: The world of AI is getting more complex, and we assess the current state of LLMs, what makes them tick, and explore the risks and features that companies are looking to integrate in the future.
items.author: Bruno Ferreira
items.titleZh: 探秘人工智能未来——今日模型、明日智能体与巨大隐私问题
items.descriptionZh: 人工智能领域日趋复杂；我们评估大语言模型的发展现状、解析其运作机制，并探讨企业未来寻求整合应用的风险管控与功能特性。

items.title: ISSCC 2026: Rebellions details industry's first quad-chiplet AI solution with UCIe interconnects — claims Rebel100 AI accelerator equals the power of Nvidia H200 with lower power envelope
items.description: Rebellions details how it developed one of the world's first quad-chiplet AI accelerator with UCIe interconnects and how it did not use all of the technologies that the UCIe 1.0 specifications includes.
items.content: Rebellions details how it developed one of the world's first quad-chiplet AI accelerator with UCIe interconnects and how it did not use all of the technologies that the UCIe 1.0 specifications includes.
items.author: Anton Shilov
items.titleZh: ISSCC 2026：Rebellions发布业内首款基于UCIe互连的四芯粒AI方案，称Rebel100加速器性能比肩英伟达H200且功耗更低
items.descriptionZh: Rebellions详细介绍了他们如何开发出全球首批采用UCIe芯片间互联技术的四芯粒AI加速器，同时指出该产品并未完全采用UCIe 1.0规范包含的所有技术。

items.title: Nvidia Sells Arm Shares, Signals Realignment of AI Portfolio
items.description:
Nvidia is positioning itself as an integrator of a complete AI stack encompassing GPUs, CPUs, and interconnect.
The post Nvidia Sells Arm Shares, Signals Realignment of AI Portfolio appeared first on EE Times.
items.content:
Nvidia is positioning itself as an integrator of a complete AI stack encompassing GPUs, CPUs, and interconnect.

The post Nvidia Sells Arm Shares, Signals Realignment of AI Portfolio appeared first on EE Times.
items.author: Majeed Ahmad
items.titleZh: Nvidia出售Arm股票 暗示人工智能业务布局调整
items.descriptionZh: 英伟达正致力于成为涵盖GPU、CPU及互联技术的完整人工智能技术栈整合者。《英伟达出售安谋股份，表明其AI投资组合正在调整》一文首刊于《电子工程专辑》。

items.title: The Data Centers Have Arrived at the Edge of the Arctic Circle
items.description: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.
items.content: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.
items.author: Joel Khalili
items.titleZh: 数据中心落户北极圈边缘
items.descriptionZh: 在AI实验室大量使用计算资源的同时，数据中心运营商纷纷北上寻求廉价且充足的能源。

items.title: AMD details Ryzen AI 400 desktop with up to 8 cores, Radeon 860M graphics — APUs won’t be available as boxed units, only in OEM systems
items.description: After announcing Ryzen AI 400 APUs earlier this year, AMD has finally revealed the specifications for the chips. However, they’re targeting OEM systems, and they top out lower than AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 mobile lineup.
items.content: After announcing Ryzen AI 400 APUs earlier this year, AMD has finally revealed the specifications for the chips. However, they’re targeting OEM systems, and they top out lower than AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 mobile lineup.
items.author: Jake Roach
items.titleZh: AMD详解Ryzen AI 400桌面处理器：最高8核配Radeon 860M显卡，APU仅限OEM整机销售
items.descriptionZh: 在今年早些时候公布锐龙AI 400 APU后，AMD终于披露了该系列芯片的具体规格。不过这些芯片主要面向OEM整机系统，且最高配置远低于AMD锐龙AI 400移动端产品线。

items.title: Nokia Bets the Network on Nvidia in AI and 6G Pivot
items.description:
At MWC 2026, Nokia outlines its strategic vision for AI-RAN, edge intelligence, and the global 6G horizon, emphasizing a shift from custom hardware to Nvidia GPUs.
The post Nokia Bets the Network on Nvidia in AI and 6G Pivot appeared first on EE Times.
items.content:
At MWC 2026, Nokia outlines its strategic vision for AI-RAN, edge intelligence, and the global 6G horizon, emphasizing a shift from custom hardware to Nvidia GPUs.

The post Nokia Bets the Network on Nvidia in AI and 6G Pivot appeared first on EE Times.
items.author: Pablo Valerio
items.titleZh: 诺基亚将网络押注于英伟达，以转向人工智能与6G战略
items.descriptionZh: 在2026年世界移动通信大会上，诺基亚阐述了其在AI-RAN、边缘智能以及全球6G发展视野方面的战略规划，重点强调从定制硬件向英伟达GPU的转型。《诺基亚以AI与6G转型为契机，将网络未来押注于英伟达》——EE Times率先报道。

items.title: AMD’s K6-III ‘Sharptooth’ debuted this week in 1999 with on-die L2 cache to savage the Intel Pentium II — it also held the line against the Pentium III
items.description: AMD launched its first processors with on-die L2 cache this week in 1999, heralding the beginning of the Super Socket 7 era.
items.content: AMD launched its first processors with on-die L2 cache this week in 1999, heralding the beginning of the Super Socket 7 era.
items.author: Mark Tyson
items.titleZh: 1999年本周，AMD K6-III“利齿”处理器横空出世，凭借片上二级缓存重创英特尔奔腾II——同时亦能抗衡奔腾III的进攻。
items.descriptionZh: 1999年的本周，AMD推出了首款将二级缓存直接集成于芯片之上的处理器，开启了Super Socket 7时代。

items.title: NVIDIA Advances Autonomous Networks With Agentic AI Blueprints and Telco Reasoning Models
items.description:
Autonomous networks — intelligent, self-managing telecommunications operations — are moving from a future vision to a current priority for telecom operators. In the latest NVIDIA State of AI in Telecommunications report, network automation emerged as the top AI use case for investment and return on investment. Automation is different from autonomy. Beyond executing predefined workflows,	
		Read Article
items.content: Autonomous networks — intelligent, self-managing telecommunications operations — are moving from a future vision to a current priority for telecom operators. In the latest NVIDIA State of AI in Telecommunications report, network automation emerged as the top AI use case for investment and return on investment. Automation is different from autonomy. Beyond executing predefined workflows, Read Article
items.author: Amogh Dendukuri
items.titleZh: NVIDIA通过智能体化AI蓝图与电信推理模型推进自动驾驶网络发展
items.descriptionZh: 自主网络——即智能自主的电信运营——正从未来愿景转变为电信运营商当前的首要任务。在英伟达最新发布的《电信领域人工智能现状报告》中，网络自动化已成为人工智能投资与回报的首要应用场景。自动化有别于自主化，其价值不仅在于执行预先定义的工作流，阅读文章

items.title: NVIDIA and Partners Show That Software-Defined AI-RAN Is the Next Wireless Generation
items.description:
AI-RAN is moving from lab to field, showing that a software-defined approach is the only viable way to build future AI-native wireless networks. Ahead of Mobile World Congress (MWC), running March 2-5 in Barcelona, NVIDIA and Nokia announced new AI-RAN collaborations with top telecom operators across Europe, Asia and North America, powered by NVIDIA AI-RAN	
		Read Article
items.content: AI-RAN is moving from lab to field, showing that a software-defined approach is the only viable way to build future AI-native wireless networks. Ahead of Mobile World Congress (MWC), running March 2-5 in Barcelona, NVIDIA and Nokia announced new AI-RAN collaborations with top telecom operators across Europe, Asia and North America, powered by NVIDIA AI-RAN Read Article
items.author: Kanika Atri
items.titleZh: NVIDIA与合作伙伴展示软件定义AI-RAN为下一代无线技术
items.descriptionZh: AI-RAN正从实验室走向现实应用，这表明软件定义方法是构建未来人工智能原生无线网络的唯一可行途径。在世界移动通信大会（MWC）即将于3月2日至5日在巴塞罗那举行之际，英伟达与诺基亚宣布将携手欧洲、亚洲和北美的多家顶尖电信运营商，在英伟达AI-RAN技术的驱动下展开新的合作。查看全文

history.author: Stevie Bonifield
history.titleZh: 英伟达耗资40亿美元投入光子学，以保持AI领域领先优势
history.descriptionZh:
英伟达本周一宣布，将向Lumentum和Coherent两家公司分别投资20亿美元。这两家企业均致力于开发用于数据中心的光子技术，包括光学收发器、电路开关和激光器等关键部件，旨在实现长距离高速数据传输。

此次投资建立在英伟达此前战略布局的基础上。2020年，英伟达收购网络硬件公司迈络思（Mellanox），成功强化了其NVLink技术，显著提升了GPU间的数据交换能力。如今，随着AI模型规模不断扩大，数据中心内部及之间的数据传输需求呈现爆炸式增长，传统电互连在能耗、带宽和距离上面临根本性瓶颈。光子技术利用光信号而非电信号进行数据传输，被视为下一代高性能计算和数据中心互连的关键突破方向。

Lumentum与Coherent的核心技术聚焦于光电转换与光传输。光学收发器将电信号转换为光信号，通过光纤进行极低损耗的传输，再在接收端转换回电信号。其创新点在于通过先进的集成光子学、硅光技术和高效激光器，不断提升模块的带宽密度（即单位面积或能耗下的数据传输能力）和能效比。例如，相干光通信技术能够利用光的相位和振幅信息，在单一波长上承载更多数据，从而大幅提升光纤的频谱效率。

从性能参数看，当前先进的数据中心光模块正从400G向800G乃至1.6T演进。与传统的铜缆或电互连相比，光互连在相同带宽下功耗可降低多达50%，传输距离可从数米（高速电信号）扩展至数公里甚至更远而不失真。这对于构建跨机架、跨数据中心乃至跨地域的GPU集群至关重要。英伟达的此次投资，特别是与Lumentum签订的“多年期数十亿美元采购承诺”非独家协议，旨在确保其未来AI数据中心平台能够获得稳定、先进的光子学元件供应，从而在系统层面突破数据传输瓶颈。

这项投资的技术影响深远。首先，它将加速光子技术与主流计算架构的融合，推动“光进铜退”在数据中心内部的进程。其次，它将助力英伟达构建端到端的AI计算基础设施，从GPU计算核心到网络互连，实现全栈优化。最终，高性能、低延迟、高能效的光互连将直接赋能大规模AI训练集群、高性能计算、云基础设施以及未来的沉浸式互联网应用，为下一波AI创新提供必要的基础设施支撑。

history.title: Exploring the future of Artificial Intelligence — today's models, tomorrow's agents, and the big privacy problem
history.description: The world of AI is getting more complex, and we assess the current state of LLMs, what makes them tick, and explore the risks and features that companies are looking to integrate in the future.
history.content: The world of AI is getting more complex, and we assess the current state of LLMs, what makes them tick, and explore the risks and features that companies are looking to integrate in the future.
history.author: Bruno Ferreira
history.titleZh: 探秘人工智能未来——今日模型、明日智能体与巨大隐私问题
history.descriptionZh: 人工智能领域日趋复杂；我们评估大语言模型的发展现状、解析其运作机制，并探讨企业未来寻求整合应用的风险管控与功能特性。

history.title: ISSCC 2026: Rebellions details industry's first quad-chiplet AI solution with UCIe interconnects — claims Rebel100 AI accelerator equals the power of Nvidia H200 with lower power envelope
history.description: Rebellions details how it developed one of the world's first quad-chiplet AI accelerator with UCIe interconnects and how it did not use all of the technologies that the UCIe 1.0 specifications includes.
history.content: Rebellions details how it developed one of the world's first quad-chiplet AI accelerator with UCIe interconnects and how it did not use all of the technologies that the UCIe 1.0 specifications includes.
history.author: Anton Shilov
history.titleZh: ISSCC 2026：Rebellions发布业内首款基于UCIe互连的四芯粒AI方案，称Rebel100加速器性能比肩英伟达H200且功耗更低
history.descriptionZh: Rebellions详细介绍了他们如何开发出全球首批采用UCIe芯片间互联技术的四芯粒AI加速器，同时指出该产品并未完全采用UCIe 1.0规范包含的所有技术。

history.title: Nvidia Sells Arm Shares, Signals Realignment of AI Portfolio
history.description:
Nvidia is positioning itself as an integrator of a complete AI stack encompassing GPUs, CPUs, and interconnect.

history.author: Majeed Ahmad
history.titleZh: Nvidia出售Arm股票 暗示人工智能业务布局调整
history.descriptionZh: 英伟达正致力于成为涵盖GPU、CPU及互联技术的完整人工智能技术栈整合者。《英伟达出售安谋股份，表明其AI投资组合正在调整》一文首刊于《电子工程专辑》。

history.title: The Data Centers Have Arrived at the Edge of the Arctic Circle
history.description: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.
history.content: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.
history.author: Joel Khalili
history.titleZh: 数据中心落户北极圈边缘
history.descriptionZh: 在AI实验室大量使用计算资源的同时，数据中心运营商纷纷北上寻求廉价且充足的能源。

history.title: AMD details Ryzen AI 400 desktop with up to 8 cores, Radeon 860M graphics — APUs won’t be available as boxed units, only in OEM systems
history.description: After announcing Ryzen AI 400 APUs earlier this year, AMD has finally revealed the specifications for the chips. However, they’re targeting OEM systems, and they top out lower than AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 mobile lineup.
history.content: After announcing Ryzen AI 400 APUs earlier this year, AMD has finally revealed the specifications for the chips. However, they’re targeting OEM systems, and they top out lower than AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 mobile lineup.
history.author: Jake Roach
history.titleZh: AMD详解Ryzen AI 400桌面处理器：最高8核配Radeon 860M显卡，APU仅限OEM整机销售
history.descriptionZh: 在今年早些时候公布锐龙AI 400 APU后，AMD终于披露了该系列芯片的具体规格。不过这些芯片主要面向OEM整机系统，且最高配置远低于AMD锐龙AI 400移动端产品线。

history.title: Nokia Bets the Network on Nvidia in AI and 6G Pivot
history.description:
At MWC 2026, Nokia outlines its strategic vision for AI-RAN, edge intelligence, and the global 6G horizon, emphasizing a shift from custom hardware to Nvidia GPUs.
The post Nokia Bets the Network on Nvidia in AI and 6G Pivot appeared first on EE Times.
history.content:
At MWC 2026, Nokia outlines its strategic vision for AI-RAN, edge intelligence, and the global 6G horizon, emphasizing a shift from custom hardware to Nvidia GPUs.

history.author: Pablo Valerio
history.titleZh: 诺基亚将网络押注于英伟达，以转向人工智能与6G战略
history.descriptionZh: 在2026年世界移动通信大会上，诺基亚阐述了其在AI-RAN、边缘智能以及全球6G发展视野方面的战略规划，重点强调从定制硬件向英伟达GPU的转型。《诺基亚以AI与6G转型为契机，将网络未来押注于英伟达》——EE Times率先报道。

history.title: AMD’s K6-III ‘Sharptooth’ debuted this week in 1999 with on-die L2 cache to savage the Intel Pentium II — it also held the line against the Pentium III
history.description: AMD launched its first processors with on-die L2 cache this week in 1999, heralding the beginning of the Super Socket 7 era.
history.content: AMD launched its first processors with on-die L2 cache this week in 1999, heralding the beginning of the Super Socket 7 era.
history.author: Mark Tyson
history.titleZh: 1999年本周，AMD K6-III“利齿”处理器横空出世，凭借片上二级缓存重创英特尔奔腾II——同时亦能抗衡奔腾III的进攻。
history.descriptionZh: 1999年的本周，AMD推出了首款将二级缓存直接集成于芯片之上的处理器，开启了Super Socket 7时代。

history.title: NVIDIA Advances Autonomous Networks With Agentic AI Blueprints and Telco Reasoning Models

Autonomous networks — intelligent, self-managing telecommunications operations — are moving from a future vision to a current priority for telecom operators. In the latest NVIDIA State of AI in Telecommunications report, network automation emerged as the top AI use case for investment and return on investment. Automation is different from autonomy. history.author: Amogh Dendukuri
history.titleZh: NVIDIA通过智能体化AI蓝图与电信推理模型推进自动驾驶网络发展
history.descriptionZh: 自主网络——即智能自主的电信运营——正从未来愿景转变为电信运营商当前的首要任务。在英伟达最新发布的《电信领域人工智能现状报告》中，网络自动化已成为人工智能投资与回报的首要应用场景。自动化有别于自主化，其价值不仅在于执行预先定义的工作流，阅读文章

history.title: NVIDIA and Partners Show That Software-Defined AI-RAN Is the Next Wireless Generation
history.description:
AI-RAN is moving from lab to field, showing that a software-defined approach is the only viable way to build future AI-native wireless networks. Ahead of Mobile World Congress (MWC), running March 2-5 in Barcelona, NVIDIA and Nokia announced new AI-RAN collaborations with top telecom operators across Europe, Asia and North America, powered by NVIDIA AI-RAN	
		Read Article

history.author: Kanika Atri
history.titleZh: NVIDIA与合作伙伴展示软件定义AI-RAN为下一代无线技术
history.descriptionZh: AI-RAN正从实验室走向现实应用，这表明软件定义方法是构建未来人工智能原生无线网络的唯一可行途径。在世界移动通信大会（MWC）即将于3月2日至5日在巴塞罗那举行之际，英伟达与诺基亚宣布将携手欧洲、亚洲和北美的多家顶尖电信运营商，在英伟达AI-RAN技术的驱动下展开新的合作。查看全文
